title: Lunch and Shotgun Shoot
description: ***CANCELLED*** - Join us on Saturday for a time of food, fellowship and FUN! Everyone is invited to the Shotgun Shoot at the Pony Farm Trap and Gun Club in Kittanning, PA. We'll be having a potluck lunch, so please bring a dish to share. After lunch we'll enjoy some clay shooting. Clays are provided, but please bring your own shotgun and shells. Come out for good food, fellowship and a great time. Sign-up sheet in the back of the sanctuary.
location: Pony Farm Trap and Gun Club 592 Pony Farm Road Kittanning, PA 16201
